Name: MENU_CATEGORY_ICON_PARAM
Description: Defines menu category icon mappings and inventory/equipment UI grouping indices used for organizing player menus.

Fields.Name: Item Bag Array Index
Fields.Description: Index used for the item bag category array.

Fields.Name: Key Item Box Array Index
Fields.Description: Index used for the key item box category array.

Fields.Name: Storage Box Array Index
Fields.Description: Index used for the storage/inventory repository category array.

Fields.Name: Shop Array Index
Fields.Description: Index used for the shop category array.

Fields.Name: Inventory
Fields.Description: Is present in the general inventory menu.

Fields.Name: Chest Armor Equipment
Fields.Description: Is present for equipping body armor.

Fields.Name: Arm Armor Equipment
Fields.Description: Is present for equipping gauntlets or arm protection.

Fields.Name: Leg Armor Equipment
Fields.Description: Is present for equipping leg armor.

Fields.Name: Arrow Equipment
Fields.Description: Is present for equipping ammunition such as arrows.

Fields.Name: Item Equipment
Fields.Description: Is present for equippable consumable items.

Fields.Name: Spell Equipment
Fields.Description: Is present for equipping spells or magic abilities.

Fields.Name: Gesture Equipment
Fields.Description: Is present for equipping or assigning gestures/emotes.

Fields.Name: Storage
Fields.Description: Is present in the storage repository.

Fields.Name: Weapon & Armor Equipment
Fields.Description: Is present or equipping both weapons and armor.
